arts.ttl: 'I sunk pints as I was given weekend off at Man Utd – suddenly I had to play 85 mins'
arts.sum: Phil Jones has detailed being given a rare weekend off at Man Utd by Jose Mourinho when he drank more than he ever would, only to be needed in the squad the next day in a last-minute change of plans

arts.ttl: The alarming numbers behind Manchester United’s biggest problem – and the obvious solution
arts.sum: The Red Devils lack a finisher after underperforming in front of goal, with Erik ten Hag eager to capitalise on a promising trend and ‘kill in the box’

United levelled after the break through Ethan Wheatley’s composed, low finish and Ethan Ennis and Fletcher both threatened the City goal soon after. The Blues had taken a first-half lead through Farid Alfa-Ruprecht after both sides — United through Sam Mather and Jack Fletcher — had a couple of close chances apiece.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag lodges Man Utd 'kill' request
arts.sum: Ahead of Man Utd ’s Europa League clash against FC Twente on Wednesday, Ten Hag was asked about his side’s relative inability to finish off chances so far this season. In response, the Dutchman admitted: “We created a lot of chances in the first games of the season and last week we scored seven against Barnsley, so we are capable of scoring many goals.

arts.ttl: First look of Manchester United’s regeneration plan emerges with new 100,000-seater stadium
arts.sum: Manchester United will make a decision over whether to redevelop Old Trafford or build a new stadium

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag fearful of Twente reunion: 'It's not nice to hurt something you love'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has admitted he's not looking forward to facing FC Twente in the UEFA Europa League and would've instead preferred to play'someone else'. "Twente is the team I follow the most," he told reporters ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag is two players short of his dream Manchester United scenario
arts.sum: Man United will take on FC Twente in the Europa League on Wednesday night at Old Trafford, and Erik ten Hag has some dilemmas to solve.

arts.ttl: DELUSIONAL Man Utd believe they already have their own Musiala
arts.sum: Ben Jacobs has dismissed links to Musiala and reports that Man Utd are determined to keep the faith in 2023 signing Mason Mount. Despite links to Jamal Musiala, Manchester United feel they don't need him - because they already have Mason Mount .

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'suffer blow' in race for Barcelona midfielder
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly preparing to hand Marc Bernal a new contract at Camp Nou, dealing a major blow to Manchester United's hopes of signing the 17-year-old.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand accuses Erik ten Hag of 'confusing' Man United star after team decision
arts.sum: Manchester United were held to a goalless draw by Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday, with Marcus Rashford a second-half substitute for Erik ten Hag's side
